heading: Exception for Government-financed air transportation; reducing hardship for transportation of domestic animals
label: 4081a Exception for Government-financed air transportation; reducing hardship for transportation of domestic animals
notes: References in TextThis subsection, referred to in par. (3), means subsec. (a) of , which is classified to this section.section 6224 of Pub. L. 118–31

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of State Authorization Act of 2023, and also as part of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2024, and not as part of the Foreign Service Act of 1980 which comprises this chapter.

Amendments2024—Par. (1). , in introductory provisions, substituted “the Department and the United States Agency for International Development (USAID), and other United States Government employees under chief of mission authority are” for “the Department is” and “Department and USAID personnel, and other United States Government employees under chief of mission authority” for “Department personnel”.Pub. L. 118–159
DefinitionFor definition of “Department” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 6002 of Pub. L. 118–31section 2651 of this title
amendments: Amendments2024—Par. (1). , in introductory provisions, substituted “the Department and the United States Agency for International Development (USAID), and other United States Government employees under chief of mission authority are” for “the Department is” and “Department and USAID personnel, and other United States Government employees under chief of mission authority” for “Department personnel”.Pub. L. 118–159

children.label: A
children.text: no air carrier holding a certificate under section 41102 of such title is willing and able to transport up to 3 domestic animals accompanying such Federal personnel; and

children.label: i
children.text: outside the United States to a place in the United States;

children.label: ii
children.text: in the United States to a place outside the United States; or

children.label: iii
children.text: outside the United States to another place outside the United States.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: An amount paid pursuant to paragraph (1) for transportation by a foreign carrier may not be greater than the amount that would otherwise have been paid had the transportation been on an air carrier holding a certificate under section 41102 had that carrier been willing and able to provide such transportation. If the amount that would otherwise have been paid to such an air carrier is less than the cost of transportation on the applicable foreign carrier, the Department personnel may pay the difference of such amount.

children.heading: Domestic animal defined
children.label: 3 Domestic animal defined
children.text: In this subsection, the term “domestic animal” means a dog or a cat.
